root.sql: SELECT vr_nsk_010_006000.balance_date, vr_nsk_010_006000.member_group_no, vr_nsk_010_006000.member_group_name, vr_nsk_010_006000.member_status_code, vr_nsk_010_006000.member_status_name, vr_nsk_010_006000.count_mem, vr_nsk_010_006000.share_balance FROM vr_nsk_010_006000 where 1=1 and vr_nsk_010_006000.balance_date = '!balance_date_1!' /*WHERE*/
